name: Prefab Buildings
description:
SAMAN is a prefab building manufacturer in India producing factory-built, multi-room commercial and industrial structures from Bangalore and Greater Noida — the full range below covers projects from 300 sq ft compact offices to 3,240 sq ft production facilities, with prices from Rs 4,15,000 to Rs 35,25,000. Whether your project is a single-block office, a multi-room retail showroom, or a clear-height industrial production unit, this category lists every prefab building configuration we manufacture, along with what each suits. For the technical depth on what a prefab building is and how it differs from RCC, the main prefab building page goes into the construction methodology in detail.

How to Choose the Right Prefab Building from SAMAN's Range

Choosing the right prefab building from SAMAN's range comes down to three answers — project floor area, primary use (office, commercial, industrial, or manufacturing), and your budget band. The range spans 300 sq ft compact units up to 3,240 sq ft production facilities, from Rs 4,15,000 to Rs 35,25,000. Match those three answers to the products below.

If your project is a small office (300–500 sq ft)

For a single-block office for 4 to 8 people, our prefab office building at 30 × 12 × 9 ft is the entry point. If you anticipate phased growth and want to add rooms later, the modular office building is built to stack and extend without demolition.

If your project is a commercial or retail building (1,500–2,500 sq ft)

For a commercial showroom, branch office, or service-centre exterior, the commercial-grade prefab building at 60 × 36 × 14 ft carries the commercial finish standard — flat-panel facade, glazing options, public-facing layout. For purchase intent with no customisation requirement, the standard-purchase prefabricated buildings model ships as a ready spec.

If your project is an industrial or factory building (2,000–8,000 sq ft)

For multi-room industrial buildings combining production floor, supervisor cabin, and washroom under one roof, the industrial-grade prefab building at 60 × 36 × 14 ft is the standard configuration. For a dedicated production facility with machinery-grade flooring and ventilation provision, our manufacturing building at 90 × 36 × 14 ft is configured for production lines from the start.

If your project needs steel-frame emphasis or IS-certified documentation

For procurement tenders requiring IS-certified steel structure, the prefabricated steel building at 90 × 36 × 14 ft carries the IS-2062 certification trail. For mid-scale steel-frame projects under that documentation requirement, the steel prefab building at 60 × 36 × 14 ft is the entry-scale steel-frame option.

If your project is a container-form structure or compact retail unit

For a container-form structure where the steel container module is the architectural choice, the container building at 20 × 15 × 8.6 ft offers a faster, more compact alternative to a full-scale prefab build.

The Full Prefab Building Range — Sizes, Price Bands and What Each Suits

Every product below is a configured, factory-built structure. The configuration and price shown is the live entry-level spec on each product page; custom sizes and fit-outs are quoted on request.
Product Entry configuration & price Best for
Prefab Office Buildings 30 × 12 × 9 ft / 360 sq ft · Rs 4,15,000 Compact single-block office for 4–8 staff
Prefabricated Buildings (buy) 20 × 15 × 8.6 ft / 300 sq ft · Rs 4,25,000 Standard-purchase model, no customisation
Container Buildings 20 × 15 × 8.6 ft / 300 sq ft · Rs 4,45,000 Container-form structure or compact retail
Prefab Buildings (flagship) 30 × 15 × 12 ft / 450 sq ft · Rs 12,75,000 Multi-room flagship for offices and retail
Modular Office Buildings 20 × 15 × 11 ft / 300 sq ft · Rs 13,85,000 Two-storey ready, expandable workspace
Steel Prefab Buildings 60 × 36 × 14 ft / 2,160 sq ft · Rs 20,45,000 Mid-scale steel-frame structure
Prefab Industrial Buildings 60 × 36 × 14 ft / 2,160 sq ft · Rs 24,25,000 Multi-room industrial, mixed production + back-of-house
Prefab Commercial Buildings 60 × 36 × 14 ft / 2,160 sq ft · Rs 25,20,000 Commercial finish — showrooms, branch offices
Prefab Manufacturing Buildings 90 × 36 × 14 ft / 3,240 sq ft · Rs 33,55,000 Dedicated production with machinery provision
Prefabricated Steel Buildings 90 × 36 × 14 ft / 3,240 sq ft · Rs 35,25,000 IS-2062 certified, tender-grade structure
For projects outside these entry configurations — larger floor areas, multi-storey requirements, or specific fit-out needs — every product is fully customisable at the brief stage.

What Sets SAMAN Apart as a Prefab Building Manufacturer in India

SAMAN is one of the few prefabricated building manufacturers in India that designs, fabricates, and installs its full prefab building range in-house. Both our Bangalore (Gopasandra) and Greater Noida (Jalpura) facilities run independent fabrication lines covering structural steel work, panel assembly, electrical, and commercial-finish fit-out — the same five-stage process applies to a 360 sq ft office and a 3,240 sq ft production building. Across the prefabricated buildings in India market, our scale handles projects from 300 sq ft up to the multi-bay structures in the 8,000 sq ft+ band on custom briefs — the same in-house process, the same material sourcing, the same five-stage QA, whether the order is one compact office building or a multi-block campus. The structural steel on every prefab building is IS-certified — the same specification on a small modular office as on a multi-bay industrial structure. Our in-house design team handles structural drawings, anchor-bolt layouts, and the structural engineer certification your industrial-zone or commercial-plot approval will require — included with the order, not billed separately. Pan-India delivery is standard from both facilities — Bangalore covers South and West India, Greater Noida covers North and East. Buyers sourcing pre-engineered steel components separately, without erection scope, are better served by our pre-engineered buildings cluster, which is a different procurement model from the turnkey prefab building range listed above.

Questions Buyers Ask Before Choosing a Prefab Building Manufacturer

What is the price range across SAMAN's prefab building products? Entry prices on the live range run from Rs 4,15,000 for a compact 360 sq ft office building up to Rs 35,25,000 for a 3,240 sq ft IS-certified steel structure. For custom builds, pricing is worked out per square foot at brief stage, with the actual rate depending on storey count, interior finish grade, glazing scope, and the structural specification your project needs. Itemised costing comes back with the project quote within 24 hours of brief. What sizes of prefab buildings can SAMAN manufacture? Our standard configurations span 300 sq ft up to 3,240 sq ft as listed in the range above. Beyond standard, we manufacture custom prefab buildings up to and above 8,000 sq ft on project briefs — for example, multi-bay industrial structures, two and three-storey office blocks, and institutional buildings combining office, classroom, and utility spaces in one structure. Smaller requirements that do not need a full prefab building structure are usually served from our portable office cabin range instead. Where are SAMAN's prefab buildings manufactured, and where can they be delivered? Every prefab building is manufactured at one of our two facilities — Gopasandra (Bangalore) for South and West India dispatch, and Jalpura (Greater Noida) for North and East India dispatch. Pan-India delivery is standard. Site location influences logistics cost only, not lead time for fabrication. We have installed prefab buildings on projects across more than 20 states. Does SAMAN offer custom prefab building designs, or only the standard models above? The 10 products in the range above are configured starting points — every one is customisable on dimensions, internal partition layout, exterior finish, glazing, and fit-out specification. About 70% of our project orders involve customisation beyond the standard configuration. Share what your project actually needs and we respond with a preliminary floor plan, structural brief, and itemised cost estimate within 24 hours.

Get a Project Quote for Your Prefab Building Requirement

Share the basics of your project — floor area, what the building is for, and your site location. We respond with a preliminary floor plan, structural brief, and itemised cost estimate within 24 hours. Bangalore — Call +91 80886 85440 · WhatsApp +91 88616 22859 Delhi NCR — Call +91 87960 39938 · WhatsApp +91 97089 89937
